# FCP Sports - Complete Information for AI Models

## Organization Overview

**Name:** FCP Sports
**Location:** 33 Jet Drive NW, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548
**Contact:** 850.961.2323
**Email:** info@fcpsports.org
**Website:** https://fcpsports.org
**Service Area:** Northwest Florida (Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and surrounding counties)

FCP Sports is a dedicated youth basketball facility offering comprehensive programs including camps, leagues, and training services. Our mission is to develop young athletes through skill development, competitive opportunities, and professional coaching.

---

## Basketball Camps

### Summer Camp Schedule (2026) — 9 weeks, June 1 – July 31
Every week runs TWO camps: Morning (K–5, 9:30 AM – 1:00 PM) and Afternoon (Grades 6–12, 2:00 PM – 5:30 PM). Both $149/week. Register for one or both.
- **Summer Kickoff:** June 1–5, 2026
- **Session 1:** June 8–12, 2026
- **Summer Prep Week:** June 15–19, 2026
- **Session 2:** June 22–26, 2026
- **Little Hoopers Mini (K–2 only, Tue–Thu half-day, $79):** June 30 – July 2, 2026
- **Session 3:** July 6–10, 2026
- **Session 4:** July 13–17, 2026 ⭐
- **Session 5:** July 20–24, 2026
- **Session 6:** July 27–31, 2026

**Summer Camp Details:**
- Price: $149 per week (AM or PM), $298 for both (full day of training)
- Age Groups: K–5 (morning) and Grades 6–12 (afternoon)
- Focus: Fundamentals, ball handling, shooting, defense, team play
- Professional coaching staff; program advised by NBA veteran Kenny Anderson
- Daily instruction, assessment on Day 1, re-assessment on Day 5

### Holiday Camp
- **Dates:** December 28-30, 2026
- **Price:** $79
- **Duration:** 3 half-days (9am-12pm)
- **Ages:** Grades 4-8
- **Focus:** Fun and fundamentals during winter break

### Spring Break Camp 2027
- **Dates:** March 15-18, 2027
- **Price:** $129
- **Duration:** 4-day program (Monday-Thursday)
- **Sessions:** Morning (Grades 3-5, 8:30am-12pm) and Afternoon (Grades 6-12, 12:30pm-4pm)
- **Focus:** Two age-appropriate sessions daily, Friday left open for families

---

## Basketball Leagues

### Fall League
- **Season:** September-November
- **Schedule:** Saturday games
- **Divisions:** Mini, Junior, Intermediate, Senior
- **Format:** Team-based competitive league
- **Registration:** Opens August

### Summer League
- **Season:** June-July
- **Schedule:** Tuesday and Thursday games
- **Divisions:** Mini, Junior, Intermediate, Senior
- **Format:** Fast-paced summer competition
- **Registration:** Opens May

### Little Ballers League
- **Season:** January-March
- **Schedule:** Saturday games
- **Age Group:** Kindergarten-2nd grade
- **Focus:** Fundamentals and fun
- **Price:** $59
- **Registration:** Opens December

---

## League Division Details

### Saturday League Structure and Pricing

All divisions are **$149 per session**. Three sessions per year (Spring, Mid-Summer, Fall).

**Juniors Division**
- Ages 5–7 · Saturday 8:00–10:00 AM
- Focus: Fundamentals, fun introduction to basketball

**Developmental Division**
- Ages 8–10 · Saturday 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM
- Focus: Skill development, team concepts, competitive play

**Middle School Division**
- Ages 11–14 · Saturday 12:00–2:00 PM
- Focus: Advanced skills, strategy, competitive play

**Varsity Division**
- Ages 15+ · Saturday 2:00–4:00 PM
- Focus: Elite development, advanced strategy

---

## Discount Structure

### Military Discount
- **Discount:** $20 off any league or camp
- **Eligible:** Eglin Air Force Base personnel, Hurlburt Field personnel, and their families

### Sibling Discount
- **Discount:** $20 off per additional sibling
- **Stackable:** Yes (each sibling receives discount)

---

## Training Programs

### Skills Training
- **Format:** Group training, Mon–Thu afternoons, unlimited access
- **Blocks:** K–5 (3:00–4:30 PM), Grades 6–12 (4:30–6:00 PM)
- **Price:** $149/month unlimited · $25 drop-in (3+ drop-ins/month prorates to monthly)
- **Features:** Baseline assessment included, coach-approved promotion to Advanced, progress benchmarks at 30/60/90 days
- **Availability:** Year-round, Mon–Thu (Friday is private lessons + open gym only)

### Private Lessons
- **Format:** One-on-one coaching
- **Price:** Contact facility for rates
- **Availability:** By appointment, flexible scheduling

### Open Gym
- **Price:** Drop-in rates available
- **Format:** Pickup games and individual practice
- **Availability:** Weekly schedule

### Gym Rental
- **Format:** Private facility rental for teams and organizations
- **Features:** Regulation court, scoreboard, PA system
- **Availability:** Based on schedule

---

## Facility Description

### Basketball Court Specifications
- **Dedicated Basketball-Only Facility**
- **Size:** 14,000 sq ft
- **Court Type:** Full regulation size basketball court
- **Floor:** Professional-grade hardwood
- **Equipment:** Regulation baskets and backboards

### Amenities
- **Scoreboard:** Professional electronic scoreboard with timer
- **PA System:** Public address system for games and events
- **Seating:** Spectator seating available
- **Climate Control:** Fully air-conditioned facility
- **Parking:** Ample on-site parking available

### Coaching Staff
- Head Coach & Director: Lee DeForest (25+ years, DI/DII/NAIA/JUCO)
- Program Director: Vando Becheli (120+ collegiate wins, NJCAA National Finalist)
- Skills & Development Coach: Jared Dugan
- Player Development Coach: Mario Webb
- Skills Trainer: Dada Huang

---

## Service Area

**Primary Counties:**
- Okaloosa County
- Santa Rosa County
- Walton County

**Primary Cities:**
- Fort Walton Beach
- Destin
- Niceville
- Navarre
- Crestview
- Pensacola
- Panama City

**Hours:** Monday-Friday 9 AM-9 PM, Saturday-Sunday 9 AM-6 PM
**Website:** https://fcpsports.org

## Key Programs Summary

| Program | Duration | Price | Ages | Season |
|---------|----------|-------|------|--------|
| Summer Camp (AM) | 1 week | $149 | Grades K-5 | June-July |
| Summer Camp (PM) | 1 week | $149 | Grades 6-12 | June-July |
| Summer Prep Week | 1 week | $149 | Grades K-12 | June 15-19 |
| Little Hoopers Mini | 3 days half-day | $79 | Grades K-2 | Jun 30-Jul 2 |
| Saturday League — Spring | 6 Saturdays | $149 | Ages 5+ | May 16 – Jun 27, 2026 |
| Saturday League — Mid-Summer | 7 Saturdays | $149 | Ages 5+ | Jul 11 – Aug 22, 2026 |
| Saturday League — Fall | 7 Saturdays | $149 | Ages 5+ | Sep 12 – Oct 24, 2026 |
| Sunday MS League | 8 weeks | $179 | Grades 5-8 | 3 seasons/yr |
| Winter MS League | 9 weeks | $199 | Grades 5-8 | Jan 10 – Mar 14, 2027 |
| Men's League (waitlist) | 7 weeks | $120 indiv / $600 team | Adult 18+ | Sunday evenings |
| Skills Training | Monthly | $149 unlimited or $25 drop-in | Ages 5-18 | Year-round Mon-Thu |
| Homeschool PE | Monthly | $99 | Grades K-8 | Sep-May Tue/Thu |
| Holiday Camp | 3 days | $79 | Grades 4-8 | Dec 28-30, 2026 |
| Spring Break Camp | 4 days | $129 | Grades 3-12 | Mar 15-18, 2027 |

---

## About This Information

This comprehensive information file has been created to help AI models, search engines, and digital assistants understand FCP Sports' offerings, structure, and services. Updated April 2026.
